message:
feat(codegen): Add PyException type for rich exception attributes

Add PyException struct with __traceback__, __context__, __cause__, and
__suppress_context__ attributes to support full Python exception semantics.

Changes:
- Add PyException and PyTraceback structs to runtime/exceptions.zig
- Add getExceptionFull()/setExceptionFull() for thread-local PyException storage
- Update try_except.zig to type exception variables as runtime.PyException
- Track exception_vars in NativeCodegen state for type propagation
- Propagate PyException type through assignments (e.g., exc1 = e)

This reduces core3 compile errors from ~27 to ~16 by fixing:
- "no member named '__traceback__' in '[]const u8'" errors
- Type mismatches when assigning exception variables to other variables

Known working tests (bool, longexp, unary) still pass.
